title: Publish Dark_Mellow theme package + installer to GitHub
description: Package the live Mellow-Dark theme (post full-parity + cosmetic apply) plus assets from /home/home/Pictures/Dark_Mellow into an installable release with a launcher/installer script, and push it to https://github.com/BigCatMellow/Dark_Mellow. The repo already has one earlier push (2026-06-30T19:09Z) that predates the full-parity/cosmetic work and must not be treated as current.
acceptance_criteria: Package sources the current live /home/home/.themes/Mellow-Dark (post full-parity + cosmetic recolor), not the stale 2026-06-30T19:09Z push
Installer/launcher script provided for one-command install on another Mint/Cinnamon machine
No live system files modified/broken by the packaging process
